name: linux-comms
description: Unified Linux desktop client for Teams, RocketChat, and more

scripts.build: npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer
scripts.build:renderer: node scripts/generate-lucide-index.mjs && node scripts/compile-licenses.mjs && node scripts/version.mjs --dev | xargs -I{} esbuild src/renderer/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/bundle.js --platform=browser --target=chrome130 "--define:__APP_VERSION__=\"{}\"" && node scripts/copy-renderer-assets.mjs
scripts.build:renderer:prod: node scripts/generate-lucide-index.mjs && node scripts/compile-licenses.mjs && node scripts/version.mjs --current | xargs -I{} esbuild src/renderer/index.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/renderer/bundle.js --platform=browser --target=chrome130 "--define:__APP_VERSION__=\"{}\"" && node scripts/copy-renderer-assets.mjs
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run build:picker && electron .
scripts.dist: node scripts/version.mjs --bump && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer:prod && npm run build:picker:prod && electron-builder --linux
scripts.dist:appimage: node scripts/version.mjs --bump && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer:prod && npm run build:picker:prod && electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.dist:flatpak: node scripts/version.mjs --bump && npm run build:main && npm run build:renderer:prod && npm run build:picker:prod && electron-builder --linux flatpak

entry.Name: Linux Comms
entry.Comment: Unified communication client for Teams, RocketChat, and more
